service.description: The full Service Directory Service name of the format projects/*/locations/*/namespaces/*/services/*

labels.description: Set of label tags associated with the ServiceBinding resource. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

description.description: A free-text description of the resource. Max length 1024 characters.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
